symptoms: Black spots on berries in severe cases
treatments: No fully curative; trunk renewal in severe cases
prevention: Avoid wounding, sanitation, use healthy planting material
palestine_risk_season: Throughout growing season in older vines
local_advice: Grapevine trunk disease reported in regional vineyards; long-term management needed.
sources: Grapevine trunk disease research in Levant (Jordan, etc.)
